title: execution-manager Configuration
description: TDD execution pipeline: tester → builder → validator → reviewer with team-based agent roster

execution_state_bucket.description: KV bucket for execution state (observable twofer)

graph_gateway_url.description: Graph gateway URL for indexing gate (empty=disabled)

indexing_budget.description: Max wait for commit indexing after merge (e.g. 60s)

lesson_threshold.description: Error count per role per category that triggers notification

max_review_retries.description: Max reviewer re-dispatches on parse failure

model.description: Model endpoint name for agent tasks

reviewer_model.description: Model endpoint for code reviewer agent

sandbox_url.description: Sandbox server URL for worktree isolation (empty=disabled)

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout per task execution in seconds
